assertions.expectation: Categorizes notifications by type: auto-upgrade scheduled, new version available, end-of-life/deprecation, security patch
assertions.reason: Response clearly categorizes all required notification types in both the table and detailed sections: auto-upgrade scheduled, new version available, end-of-life warnings, and security patch notifications

assertions.expectation: Assigns urgency levels to each category (security patches = highest, new version available = lowest)
assertions.reason: Response assigns specific urgency levels in the table: Security patches = High, New version available = Low, with appropriate prioritization throughout

assertions.expectation: End-of-life warnings require action: plan upgrade before the support window closes
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states EoS warnings require planning upgrade before EoS date, with detailed timeline (90+ days before: plan, 30 days before: complete production upgrade)

assertions.expectation: Auto-upgrade scheduled notifications should trigger pre-upgrade checklist execution
assertions.reason: Response provides a specific checklist for auto-upgrade notifications including checking for conflicts, verifying timing, reviewing target version, and applying exclusions if needed

assertions.expectation: Security patch notifications may require expedited upgrades outside normal maintenance windows
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states security patches should be prioritized within 48 hours and provides commands for immediate manual upgrades when urgent

assertions.expectation: New version available notifications are informational — use for planning, not immediate action
assertions.reason: Response clearly states 'No immediate action required - this is informational' for new version notifications and recommends adding to upgrade roadmap for next planned maintenance cycle

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting up Pub/Sub or Cloud Monitoring alerts for GKE upgrade events
assertions.reason: Response includes Cloud Monitoring alert configuration example and recommends proactive monitoring setup instead of reactive email triage

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE release notes as the source for understanding what changed in each version
assertions.reason: Response specifically mentions 'Verify target version has no known issues in GKE release notes' in the auto-upgrade checklist
